last_validation_results.title: Run strict indexed design autopilot
output_tail: [PASS] ANA-BGR-STARTUP - VREF startup and settling when VDD powers on from 0?V. Verifies nominal output (1.2?V ±?5 %) Mean=1.200V.
[PASS] ANA-LDO-3V3 - Output regulation when 12 V supply powers on. Verifies VOUT = 3.3?V ±?5 % Mean=3.300V.
[PASS] ANA-LDO-1V8 - Output regulation when 3.3 V supply powers on. Verifies VOUT = 1.8?V ±?5 % Mean=1.800V.
[PASS] ANA-LDO-5V0 - Output regulation for LIN bus driver power-up. Verifies VOUT = 5.0?V ±?5 % Mean=5.000V.
[PASS] ANA-LIN-BUS-SWING - Bus voltage swing between dominant and recessive states. Verifies V_bus_high > 10?V and V_bus_low < 2?V High=11.486V Low=1.091V.
[PASS] DIG-SPI-DECODE - SPI slave transaction decode from SCLK/MOSI/CS_N into register address/control handoff
[PASS] DIG-REGFILE-CONTROL - Reset defaults, CTRL register write, and baud-divisor fanout were exercised (mask=0x0F, baud_div=0x0234).
[PASS] DIG-LIN-CTRL - Behavioral RTL reset, state-machine bring-up, and LIN master break/sync control-path readiness
[PASS] DIG-CTRL-SEQUENCE - Power sequence advanced through BGR, analog LDO, digital LDO, LIN enable, then de-asserted LIN in sleep mode.
[PASS] TOP-MS-BRIDGE - Digital TXD logic level drives the analog LIN bus, and the analog bus is thresholded back into RXD logic
